text.content: This means that pages are statically generated at build time, but are able to be updated without rebuilding the whole website if the content on the Notion page changes.

text.content: Issues

rich_text.plain_text: Issues

text.content: I found that some of the images would break, and the fix would be that I needed to rebuild the application. I think that it had to do with the URL that Notion returns for the image hosted in S3 expiring. I solved this by setting up a cron job to rebuild the site every morning, it isn’t an ideal solution but it keeps things fresh.

rich_text.plain_text: I found that some of the images would break, and the fix would be that I needed to rebuild the application. I think that it had to do with the URL that Notion returns for the image hosted in S3 expiring. I solved this by setting up a cron job to rebuild the site every morning, it isn’t an ideal solution but it keeps things fresh.
